steps.title: Identify the needed claim
steps.content: The task asks for a generalization about the archive, so the choice should make a broad claim about the archive rather than report one artifact, one name, or one date.

steps.title: Use the time range
steps.content: The notes include a rubber stamp from the 1800s and a stickball collar from 2016. That supports the broad claim that not all artifacts in the archive are from the 1800s. The answer is C.
